name: Shell

description: Detailed usage analytics panel

name: PublishButton
description: Publish control with loading state

name: HardBlockModal
description: Modal blocking content generation when wallet empty

name: CardDataEditor
description: Content card inline editor

name: CarouselPreview
description: Carousel post visual preview

description: Matrix grid view of content items — ISSUE: bulk actions (generate/revise) sem AILabel explicando consumo de tokens

name: SocialConnectionsTab

name: BillingPackagesTab
description: Billing packages display and subscription

name: WhatsApprovalTab
description: WhatsApp approval flow configuration

name: Factory
description: Main content factory with creation modal

name: Console

name: BrandDna

name: Schedule
description: Content scheduling page

description: Quality gate evaluation dashboard

name: AnalyticsPage
description: Analytics dashboard with charts

name: ComplianceAuditPage
description: Compliance audit review page

name: SemanticMapPage
description: Visual semantic map of content relationships

name: AuthContext
description: Auth context provider — background polling 120s com hash change detection, wallet/usage/config refresh, logout com await signOut + credential clearing, usage tracking (tokens, posts, schedule)
